title: FroglightsReimagined
description: We felt like Froglights needed some more love, so we created a variety of colors, blocks, and crafting recipes for an amazing block.
body:
![FroglightsReimagined Logo](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Froglights_Reimagined/MP_FroglightsReimagined_header.webp)

![Divider](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c8431366a62e89c41f8b731df3c8a9ccd5d2a4f4.png) # Ever wanted to have more variety of Froglights? ![asd](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e5b118f6640ec4c09cb450523ae41af06996fbd4_0.webp) Well... we got you covered. - Adds **16 new** Froglights to choose from - Adds **16 new** Froglight Lanterns to choose from - Adds crafting recipes for **ALL** Froglights (including vanilla!) - Froglights can be **dyed _interchangeably_** using their dyes/materials ![Divider](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c8431366a62e89c41f8b731df3c8a9ccd5d2a4f4.png) ![All of the new Froglight Blocks](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/77b917e32aa6fa08d6f8f093a5553206ce774191.png) ![Divider](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c8431366a62e89c41f8b731df3c8a9ccd5d2a4f4.png) ![All of the Froglight Lanterns](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b4a36841c1b83169a437266db77ffa464196e90f.png) ![Divider](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c8431366a62e89c41f8b731df3c8a9ccd5d2a4f4.png) ## Check out the [wiki](https://github.com/CozyCord/FroglightsReimagined/wiki) to find their recipes and more info! ![asd](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e5b118f6640ec4c09cb450523ae41af06996fbd4_0.webp) ![Divider](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c8431366a62e89c41f8b731df3c8a9ccd5d2a4f4.png) ### **Future Plans** - Froglight Lamps - Other variants of Froglights - Frog Integration - More!
